name: jpsp-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at the Journal of Personality and Social Psychology (JPSP), the American Psychological Association's flagship long-format journal of personality and social psychology, organized into three independently edited sections.

plugins.name: jpsp-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Journal of Personality and Social Psychology (JPSP) manuscript lifecycle: choosing the right section (Attitudes and Social Cognition, Interpersonal Relations and Group Processes, Personality Processes and Individual Differences), building multi-study packages, internal meta-analysis, JARS reporting, APA 7th style, TOP-Level-2 transparency, masked review, and the per-section editorial process.
